framework.name: Agent-to-Merchant Infrastructure Layer
framework.description: Reference to infrastructure being built by OpenAI, Google, Stripe, and Shopify for 'agent-to-merchant' interactions in agentic commerce. Implies a new protocol or API layer specifically for AI agents to transact with merchants. Details not provided but suggests financial infrastructure players are actively building agent-specific systems.
framework.raw_quote: Major players including OpenAI, Google, Stripe, and Shopify are already building agent-to-merchant infrastructure.
